data.title: Fractal Bitcoin introduces Wrapped FB (WFB), an ERC-20 token on Ethereum, expanding into Ethereum ecosystem.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in New York, it was publicized that Fractal Bitcoin has disclosed the launch of Wrapped Fractal Bitcoin (WFB). WFB is an ERC-20 version of the Fractal Bitcoin token (FB) intended for use on Ethereum. This move signifies Fractal Bitcoin's initial venture into the Ethereum network, highlighting its efforts to expand its presence.

data.title: Alibaba's stock surges 107% after boosting AI budget past $50B, with CEO projecting global AI investment reaching $4T in five years.
data.description: Alibaba Group's (NYSE: BABA) stock reached its highest level in almost four years after revealing plans to expand its artificial intelligence investment, exceeding the previously stated target of $50 billion. Even though the stock is currently down on Thursday, it has soared by 107% year-to-date, outperforming the NYSE Composite index (which includes Alibaba) by more than 12% in returns. The incoming CEO, Eddie Wu, anticipates that worldwide AI spending could hit $4 trillion in the next five years. He has affirmed Alibaba's intention to augment its initial plan announced in February to allocate 380 billion yuan (equivalent to $53 billion) over three years towards AI models and infrastructure. This information was reported by Bloomberg on Thursday. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Luxurious estate in Syosset, NY spans 5 acres on North Shore, features 2 residences and resort amenities.
data.description: Situated on a tranquil portion of North Syosset in New York, a private compound occupying five gated acres at 365 Split Rock Road boasts two residences, resort amenities, and vast property. This estate is regarded as one of the area's most remarkable new properties, offering a secluded retreat for its residents.

data.title: Inventor from Flagler Beach, Fla. develops BAND-IT-TOWELS for easy hanging on hooks, prevents slipping.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 25, 2025, an inventor from Flagler Beach, Florida shared the creation of BAND-IT-TOWELS, aimed at providing a convenient way to hang towels on hooks. The inventor's innovative design ensures the towels stay in place, potentially enhancing drying.

data.title: Amanda McGuckin Hager promoted to CMO & CRO at TrueDialog, a leading SMS solution provider in Austin, Texas.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on September 25, 2025, TrueDialog, a prominent company offering enterprise-level SMS texting solutions, revealed the appointment of Amanda McGuckin Hager as the Chief Marketing Officer & Chief Revenue Officer (CMO & CRO). McGuckin Hager's promotion signifies a pivotal move within the company as she takes on the dual role to drive marketing and revenue strategies.

data.title: OMED conference in Nashville, hosting world's largest gathering of osteopathic physicians and students from Sept 25-28.
data.description: A significant gathering of osteopathic physicians, the Osteopathic Medical Education Conference (OMED) organized by the American Osteopathic Association, is scheduled from September 25 to 28 in Nashville, Tennessee. This event stands as the largest yearly assembly of osteopathic medical professionals worldwide.

data.title: Penn Station East Coast Subs collaborates with Barstool Sports for MEGA CHEESESTEAK. Announcement made Sept. 25, 2025.
data.description: In collaboration with Barstool Sports' Pardon My Take and Virtual Dining Concepts, Penn Station East Coast Subs introduces a new menu item in Cincinnati on September 25, 2025. The franchise, renowned for its diverse selection of grilled-to-order subs and deli classics, has partnered to offer an exciting addition to its menu. This collaboration is set to bring a unique offering to customers, further enhancing the dining experience.

data.title: "Global green building materials market to grow at 8.75% CAGR from 2024 to 2030 per ResearchAndMarkets report."
data.description: Dublin - A recent report on the "Green Building Materials Market Research" predicts a substantial growth rate for the global market. With an anticipated CAGR of 8.75% between 2024 and 2030, the market is witnessing significant expansion driven by growing awareness and prioritization of environmental sustainability by consumers and businesses. This trend is fostering a heightened demand for buildings constructed with reduced environmental footprints. The report was added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings.

data.title: Bitcoin's facing imminent $110K retest amidst US dollar hitting three-week high; new local lows seen due to strong US jobs data.
data.description: Bitcoin experienced a drop to fresh local lows following the release of robust US jobs data, aligning with a broader market correction that also impacted stocks and gold. Analysts referred to this adjustment as a necessary and anticipated occurrence.

data.title: ECD offers VIP Client Test Drives within 75-mile radius of its locations in West Palm Beach, Miami, and Kissimmee.
data.description: ECD's VIP Test Drive service is offered in a 75-mile radius of its locations, including West Palm Beach to Miami, Kissimmee, and surrounding areas.

data.title: Check Point Software obtains FedRAMP Authorization, providing AI-Powered Cyber Security to U.S. Federal Agencies.
data.description: Today, Check Point revealed that it has obtained complete FedRAMP Authorization, granting U.S. Federal Agencies access to AI-Powered Cyber Security solutions.
